title: SuperCharged
description: A tech and magic modpack with a lot of content mods, loads of utility and some other stuff
body:
# SuperCharged
A fun modpack with loads of optimisation, content and utility that can run on very low-end computers.
The modpack is mostly magic and tech, and is fully modrinth only, with nearly 170 mods.

# AutoUpdate 
Download the autoupdating version of this modpack at https://webducky.cf/kat/SuperCharged.zip  
Just drop it into ATLauncher (recommended by me), MultiMC or PolyMC and it'll work

# SuperCharged anarchy server
You can try out SuperCharged in all its glory on SuperCharged's official anarchy minecraft server (it's included in featured servers in the modpack)

# Feedback
You can also talk to me in the Discord server linked below, or say your feedback and suggest mods there.

# Terrain
When generating a world in singleplayer, make sure to use the Terra preset for funky cool terrain!

# Requirements
## Minimum
### RAM
1GB of RAM, 512MB available to Minecraft (make sure to use the IBM Semeru JDK for such low memory amounts, otherwise you will need 2GB of RAM available to Minecraft)

### GPU
GT710 (able to handle 30fps, 1080p fullscreen, windowed 720p recommended)

### CPU 
Not sure, anything better than an Intel Core 2 Duo should work

## Recommended
### RAM
8GB on host, 2-4GB of RAM free for Minecraft (2 is more than enough with IBM Semeru JDK, 4 is fine for normal OpenJDK builds)

### GPU
A GTX 660 can handle 100FPS in fullscreen 1080p

### CPU
anything faster than an Intel Core i5 2nd Gen

# More optimization
Make sure to read this gist! https://gist.github.com/terminalmaid/cd835fbac39c0c446006250df010d7ca
